---
title: "Saroj Pathak"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="description" content="Data-driven analysis of Nepal's public finance, governance, and political economy — with a focus on subnational fiscal systems and intergovernmental transfers.">
# listing:
#   - id: recent-research
#     contents: research
#     sort: "date desc"
#     max-items: 3
#     type: default
#     template: _templates/research-card.ejs
---

```{=html}
<!-- ============ NAVBAR ============ -->
<nav class="sp-nav">
  <a href="/" class="sp-nav-name">Home</a>
  <ul class="sp-nav-links">
    <li><a href="/research.html">Research</a></li>
    <li><a href="/tools.html">Tools</a></li>
    <li><a href="/about.html">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="/contact.html">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- ============ HERO ============ -->
<section class="sp-hero">
  <span class="sp-hero-label">Public Finance &amp; Policy Analytics · Nepal</span>
  <h1 class="sp-hero-name">Saroj Pathak</h1>
  <p class="sp-hero-descriptor">
    I analyse Nepal's fiscal and governance data to support better 
    public decisions — turning <em>administrative records governments 
    produce but rarely interrogate</em> into evidence that decision-makers 
    can act on.
  </p>
  <a href="/research.html" class="sp-hero-cta">
    View research &nbsp;→
  </a>
</section>

<!-- ============ DIVIDER ============ -->
<div class="sp-rule"><hr></div>

<!-- ============ RECENT RESEARCH ============ -->
<section class="sp-research">
  <div class="sp-section-header">
    <h2 class="sp-section-title">Recent Research</h2>
    <a href="/research.html" class="sp-view-all">All briefs →</a>
  </div>

  <div class="sp-cards">
```

::: {#recent-research}
:::

```{=html}
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ DIVIDER ============ -->
<div class="sp-rule"><hr></div>

<!-- ============ FOCUS AREAS ============ -->
<section class="sp-focus">
  <span class="sp-section-label">What I work on</span>
  <div class="sp-focus-grid">

    <div class="sp-focus-item">
      <span class="sp-focus-item-label">01</span>
      <div class="sp-focus-item-title">Public Finance &amp; Fiscal Transfers</div>
      <p class="sp-focus-item-desc">
        Analysis of intergovernmental conditional grants, subnational 
        budget allocation, and equity in federal resource distribution 
        across Nepal's 753 local governments.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="sp-focus-item">
      <span class="sp-focus-item-label">02</span>
      <div class="sp-focus-item-title">Governance &amp; Decentralisation</div>
      <p class="sp-focus-item-desc">
        How federal policy intent translates — or fails to translate — 
        into subnational outcomes. Focus on Nepal's post-2015 federal 
        transition and its implementation gaps.
      </p>
    </div>

    <div class="sp-focus-item">
      <span class="sp-focus-item-label">03</span>
      <div class="sp-focus-item-title">Electoral &amp; Political Analytics</div>
      <p class="sp-focus-item-desc">
        Constituency-level diagnostic analysis of voter behaviour, 
        party fragmentation, and electoral volatility to support 
        evidence-based campaign strategy.
      </p>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ FOOTER ============ -->
<footer class="sp-footer">
  <span class="sp-footer-name">Saroj Pathak · Kathmandu, Nepal</span>
  <ul class="sp-footer-links">
    <li><a href="mailto:your@email.com">Email</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank">GitHub</a></li>
    <li><a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a></li>
  </ul>
</footer>
```
